_README: Machine-runnable structured inputs for the cited CO2 cases in ../data/validations.json. Values transcribed faithfully from each case's free-text 'conditions' string; the cited source/DOI/measured value live in validations.json (single source of truth). 'scope' tags model applicability: cs_aqueous = valid carbon-steel aqueous CO2 test; tlc = top-of-line / condensing regime the bulk models are NOT designed for; cra_out_of_scope = a corrosion-resistant alloy that passivates, so carbon-steel CO2 models do not apply. MAE/RMSE are computed only over cs_aqueous cases.

Tengiz (KZ) sour-sweet field - Kahyarian.note: sour-sweet; FeS co-film usually lowers the sweet-model rate

Top-of-line corrosion - Singer 2017.note: top-of-line condensing water; bulk flowline models are not TLC models

13Cr OCTG threshold - Mishina 2014.note: 13Cr CRA passivates above ~120 C; carbon-steel CO2 models do not apply

HP/HT well @ 175 C, 100 bar CO2 - Nyborg.note: protective FeCO3 scale dominates at high T

Elgaddafi 2015 - autoclave 80 C, 4.1 bar.note: stagnant 2-L autoclave (8.9 cm dia); 187 h steady-state LPR; scale-forming at 80 C; pH omitted -> computed in-situ (Crolet-Bonis), no added bicarbonate

Elgaddafi 2015 - autoclave 80 C, 6.2 bar.note: stagnant 2-L autoclave; 187 h steady-state LPR; scale-forming at 80 C; pH computed in-situ

Peng 2024 - L360N blank, CO2-saturated 5.note: CO2-saturated at 1 atm (pCO2 ~ 1 - P_H2O(40C) ~ 0.93 bar); 5 wt% NaCl; 72 h weight-loss; quiescent cell; pH omitted -> computed in-situ

Aristia 2019 - St-37 geothermal brine, 7.note: CO2 purged at 1 atm (pCO2 ~ 1 - P_H2O(70C) ~ 0.69 bar); low-Cl geothermal brine; 7 d; pH 4 measured

Tang 2018 - Q235 blank, CO2-saturated 3..note: CO2-saturated at 1 atm (pCO2 ~ 0.8 bar at 60 C); 3.5% NaCl; 72 h; measured converted from 0.345 g/m2/h -> 0.385 mm/y; pH computed in-situ
